summary: Iteration 116: Directed Studio Step 5 UX Redesign testing complete. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright. Step 5 'Deliverables Showcase' redesign working correctly with Bento Grid, horizontal scroll for scenes, and Post-Production drawer/modal.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <option> in select element - minor hydration warning, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: DirectedStudio.jsx: Step 5 (Resultado) successfully redesigned as 'Deliverables Showcase' (lines 1812-2050)
DirectedStudio.jsx: 5-step pipeline navigation with minimal timeline - gold active node, white done nodes, dark gray future nodes (lines 690-720)
DirectedStudio.jsx: Hero section for 'O Filme Completo' with data-testid='deliverable-filme-completo' (lines 1835-1858)
DirectedStudio.jsx: Bento Grid with 4 product cards - Livro Animado, Storyboard PDF, Pós-Produção, Analytics (lines 1860-1929)
DirectedStudio.jsx: Horizontal scroll for individual scene videos with data-testid='deliverables-cenas' (lines 1931-1975)
DirectedStudio.jsx: Post-Production drawer/modal opens when clicking deliverable-pos-producao, closeable via close-post-production (lines 1997-2028)
tailwind.config.js: Added serif (Cormorant Garamond) and sans (Manrope) font families
index.css: Google Fonts import for Cormorant Garamond and Manrope added
PostProduction.jsx: Minor issue - <span> inside <option> causing hydration warning (line 248)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing project fce897cf6ba3 (A HISTORIOA DE ABRAAO E ISAC) with 20 scenes and 21 video outputs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 116 verified Step 5 UX redesign: 1) Step navigation renders 5 nodes connected by timeline track with gold active node (RESULTADO), white done nodes (ROTEIRO, PERSONAGENS, STORYBOARD, PRODUÇÃO), 2) Step 5 'Resultado' page has 'ENTREGA FINAL' header with 'Seus Produtos' title using serif font, 3) Bento Grid has 4 product cards: Livro Animado (INTERATIVO), Storyboard PDF (LIVRO ILUSTRADO), Pós-Produção (NARRAÇÃO, DUBLAGEM, LEGENDAS), Analytics (PERFORMANCE DO PROJETO), 4) Horizontal scroll shows individual scenes (CENAS INDIVIDUAIS - 21 scenes) with DOWNLOAD and refresh buttons, 5) Post-Production opens as drawer/modal with video player, Legendas (SRT), and Localização Multi-Idioma options (Português, Español, Français, Deutsch, Italiano), 6) All data-testid attributes present and working. Navigation flow: Marketing -> Criar com AI Studio -> AgentZZ -> Estúdio (campaign-type-directed_studio) -> Project list -> Select project -> Step 5.

horizontal_scroll_scenes.description: Individual scenes horizontal scroll with DOWNLOAD and refresh buttons

post_production_drawer.description: Opens as drawer/modal with video player, Legendas (SRT), and Localização Multi-Idioma
